title: Claude Fable 5 sets a fluid simulation to Beethoven
summary: Claude Fable 5 generated a fluid simulation coded from scratch and produced an EDM remix of Beethoven using code, synchronizing the motion to the music beat. The demonstration showcases Claude's ability to generate both visual simulations and audio without prior exposure to music.
writeup: The video demonstrates Claude Fable 5 generating a fluid simulation coded from scratch and producing an EDM remix of Beethoven through code, with the visual motion synchronized to the music beat. It matters as a showcase of a single model producing both visual simulations and audio in one pipeline, including music generation without prior exposure to music. The concrete takeaways: code generation drives both the fluid simulation and the audio, and the demonstration ties the two together by aligning the simulation's motion to the remixed track's beat.
